info.title: ClawSentry Public API Reference
info.description: Docs-owned OpenAPI artifact generated from route inventory plus curated semantic metadata. It does not change runtime API behavior.

post.summary: OpenClaw/AHP JSON-RPC 同步决策入口
post.description: Service: `gateway`. Auth: `bearer-disabled-when-empty-token`. CS_AUTH_TOKEN empty disables Gateway bearer auth; production must set Bearer token. See `api/decisions.md#post-ahp`.

result.reason: credential file access requires operator review

post.x-clawsentry-auth-note: CS_AUTH_TOKEN empty disables Gateway bearer auth; production must set Bearer token.

post.description: Service: `gateway`. Auth: `bearer-disabled-when-empty-token`. CS_AUTH_TOKEN empty disables Gateway bearer auth; production must set Bearer token. See `api/decisions.md#post-ahp-a3s`.
post.x-clawsentry-auth-note: CS_AUTH_TOKEN empty disables Gateway bearer auth; production must set Bearer token.

post.summary: Codex native hook / HTTP transport 入口
post.description: Service: `gateway`. Auth: `bearer-disabled-when-empty-token`. CS_AUTH_TOKEN empty disables Gateway bearer auth; production must set Bearer token. See `api/decisions.md#post-ahp-codex`.
post.x-clawsentry-auth-note: CS_AUTH_TOKEN empty disables Gateway bearer auth; production must set Bearer token.

post.summary: 记录 adapter-observed effect outcome，不修改 canonical decision
post.description: Service: `gateway`. Auth: `bearer-disabled-when-empty-token`. CS_AUTH_TOKEN empty disables Gateway bearer auth; native hook subprocesses should authenticate when token is configured. See `api/decisions.md#post-ahp-adapter-effect-result`.
post.x-clawsentry-auth-note: CS_AUTH_TOKEN empty disables Gateway bearer auth; native hook subprocesses should authenticate when token is configured.

post.description: Service: `stack`. Auth: `bearer-disabled-when-empty-token`. Uses Gateway auth dependency; CS_AUTH_TOKEN empty disables Bearer auth. See `api/decisions.md#post-ahp-resolve`.
post.x-clawsentry-auth-note: Uses Gateway auth dependency; CS_AUTH_TOKEN empty disables Bearer auth.

example.reason: Operator verified the command target is a disposable sandbox.

get.description: Service: `gateway`. Auth: `none`. Gateway health endpoint is intentionally unauthenticated. See `api/reporting.md#get-health`.
get.x-clawsentry-auth-note: Gateway health endpoint is intentionally unauthenticated.

get.description: Service: `gateway`. Auth: `metrics-conditional`. CS_METRICS_AUTH=true requires Bearer token; false/empty exposes metrics without auth. See `api/reporting.md#get-metrics`.

200.description: Successful text/plain response. See api-coverage.json for the curated text example.

get.x-clawsentry-auth-note: CS_METRICS_AUTH=true requires Bearer token; false/empty exposes metrics without auth.

get.description: Service: `gateway`. Auth: `bearer-disabled-when-empty-token`. CS_AUTH_TOKEN empty disables Gateway bearer auth. See `api/reporting.md#get-report-summary`.
get.x-clawsentry-auth-note: CS_AUTH_TOKEN empty disables Gateway bearer auth.

get.description: Service: `gateway`. Auth: `query-token`. Accepts Bearer token and browser-friendly ?token= query auth; CS_AUTH_TOKEN empty disables auth. See `api/reporting.md#get-report-stream`.

200.description: Successful text/event-stream response. See api-coverage.json for the curated text example.

get.x-clawsentry-auth-note: Accepts Bearer token and browser-friendly ?token= query auth; CS_AUTH_TOKEN empty disables auth.

get.description: Service: `gateway`. Auth: `bearer-disabled-when-empty-token`. CS_AUTH_TOKEN empty disables Gateway bearer auth. See `api/reporting.md#get-report-session-post-action`.

score_semantics.aggregation: latest, sum, avg, and EWMA are separate from session_risk_ewma; do not add raw channels

get.summary: 查询 session quarantine / mark-blocked 状态
get.description: Service: `gateway`. Auth: `bearer-disabled-when-empty-token`. CS_AUTH_TOKEN empty disables Gateway bearer auth. Quarantine is explicit session mark-blocked state, not guaranteed host termination. See `api/reporting.md#get-report-session-quarantine`.
get.x-clawsentry-auth-note: CS_AUTH_TOKEN empty disables Gateway bearer auth. Quarantine is explicit session mark-blocked state, not guaranteed host termination.

post.summary: 释放 session quarantine / mark-blocked 状态
post.description: Service: `gateway`. Auth: `bearer-disabled-when-empty-token`. CS_AUTH_TOKEN empty disables Gateway bearer auth. Release is explicit and audited separately from legacy enforcement cooldown. See `api/reporting.md#post-report-session-quarantine`.
post.x-clawsentry-auth-note: CS_AUTH_TOKEN empty disables Gateway bearer auth. Release is explicit and audited separately from legacy enforcement cooldown.

get.description: Service: `gateway`. Auth: `bearer-disabled-when-empty-token`. CS_AUTH_TOKEN empty disables Gateway bearer auth. See `api/reporting.md#get-ahp-patterns`.

post.description: Service: `gateway`. Auth: `bearer-disabled-when-empty-token`. CS_AUTH_TOKEN empty disables Gateway bearer auth. See `api/reporting.md#post-ahp-patterns-confirm`.
post.x-clawsentry-auth-note: CS_AUTH_TOKEN empty disables Gateway bearer auth.

post.description: Service: `openclaw-webhook`. Auth: `webhook-token|webhook-hmac-optional`. Bearer/OpenClaw token required. HMAC is config-dependent: skipped when no secret is configured; strict mode rejects missing/invalid signatures when secret exists. Timestamp, content-type, optional IP allowlist, and idempotencyKey are validated. See `api/webhooks.md#post-webhook-openclaw`.

parameters.name: X-AHP-Signature
parameters.description: v1=<hmac-sha256>, required in strict mode when OPENCLAW_WEBHOOK_SECRET is configured

parameters.name: X-AHP-Timestamp
parameters.description: Unix timestamp used for signed webhook replay protection

post.x-clawsentry-auth-note: Bearer/OpenClaw token required. HMAC is config-dependent: skipped when no secret is configured; strict mode rejects missing/invalid signatures when secret exists. Timestamp, content-type, optional IP allowlist, and idempotencyKey are validated.

post.description: Service: `gateway`. Auth: `bearer-disabled-when-empty-token`. CS_AUTH_TOKEN empty disables Gateway bearer auth. L3 advisory is advisory-only and does not mutate historical canonical decisions. See `api/reporting.md#l3-advisory-endpoints`.
post.x-clawsentry-auth-note: CS_AUTH_TOKEN empty disables Gateway bearer auth. L3 advisory is advisory-only and does not mutate historical canonical decisions.
